title: heliophila molluginea
intro: Heliophila molluginea, also known as the hairy cranesbill or hairy heliophila, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, heliophila molluginea is often used as a tea, tincture, or infusion to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
